Linux World Internship.title: An Internship at Jaipur during Bachelor's degree
Linux World Internship.description: An Internship at Linux World ranging 30-45 days were great in terms of *learning*, *exploring*, *living* alltogether.

Kabir Singh.title: A bollywood movie 'Kabir Singh' during internship
Kabir Singh.description: Watched a movie with 3 other, and absolutely loved it, and after about 5 years, the movie still holds the same place

Red Hat Certifications.title: Bagged 2 Red hat certifications which seemed impossible to get.
Red Hat Certifications.description: Secured 2 certifications 1. RHCSA (RedHat Certified System Administrator) and 2. RHCoE (RedHat Certified Ansible Automation - EX 204(exam_code)) Certification Ids: 222-222-222

NLP Workshop.title: An 10 week NLP and Transformers workshop during Master's degree
NLP Workshop.description: An 10 Week Series Internship at Linux World ranging 30-45 days were great in terms of *learning*, *exploring*, *living* alltogether.

Competetions.title: Remained Consistent Top podium player for last 2 competetions out of 3.
Competetions.description: Came 7th at first competetion, and then came 1st and 2nd for last 2 competetions, grabbing the runner up position. This workshop also gave me tools with my curiosity to imply AI application in daily development, and creating something impactful.
